title: Variated Bucket of Axolotl (Prime's HD Textures)
description: Add-on that changes the Bucket Of Axolotl item texture to match the type of axolotl inside! Great for sorting while axolotl breeding or just keeping track of your pets.
body:
Add-on that changes the Bucket Of Axolotl item texture to match the type of axolotl inside! Great for sorting while axolotl breeding or just keeping track of your pets.

Based off of the _Vanilla Tweaks Axolotl Variants_ pack.

This is an add-on for Prime's HD Textures (256x).
